heading: Full-Text Retriever
body:
`MongoDBAtlasFullTextSearchRetriever` is a retriever that
performs full-text search by using [MongoDB Search Overview](fts-top-ref).
Specifically, it uses Lucene's standard [BM25 algorithm](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Okapi_BM25).

This retriever requires an [create a MongoDB Search index](ref-create-index).
